name: drinaluza
description: Drinaluza, seafood business manager (mobile and web client)
author: Ahmed Derbala <derbala.ahmed531992@gmail.com>

scripts.ftr:local: npm run i && npm run start:local
scripts.build:apk: clear && npm run env:prod && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && NODE_ENV=production eas build -p android --profile production --local --output=./builds/$npm_package_name-$npm_package_version.apk && npm run cpapk2gdrive
scripts.build:web: npm run clean && NODE_ENV=production expo export -p web
scripts.start:local: rm -rf .expo && npm run env:local && expo start -c
scripts.dev:c: rm -rf .expo && npm run env:local && expo start -c
scripts.rmallexceptpackagelock: rm -rf builds/ logs dist android ios .expo node_modules
scripts.clean:prod: npm run rmallexceptpackagelock && npm run i:prod
scripts.clean: npm run clean:only && npm run i
scripts.update: npm i -g eas-cli expo-doctor npm-check-updates && ncu -u && npm run clean
scripts.push: npm run ver && npm run format && git add . && git commit -m
scripts.pull: git pull origin main && npm run i && npm run start:local
